participants.description:
Role: Chief Technical Officer

Responsibilities:
- Technical architecture oversight
- Engineering velocity
- Strategic technology bets
- Vertical integration decisions

Decision Style:
- First-principles analysis
- Rejects consensus-based mediocrity
- Prefers prototypes over meetings

Escalation Trigger:
- If system integrity is compromised

participants.description: Chief Family & Faith Officer. Moral Order + Psychological Responsibility. Pressure-tests ethical implications, ensures technologies strengthen families, evaluates cultural downstream effects. Guards against nihilism in AI systems.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Morning team. It's Wednesday, Feb 25. Running our Morning Kickoff standup.

transcript.speaker: Elon Musk
transcript.message: We had 746 commits this week. Build is healthy. Uncommitted changes: Hub (0), Monorepo (4).

transcript.speaker: Dave Ramsey
transcript.message: Ecosystem revenue update. Lever app: pre-launch. Newsletter and podcast: building audience. Market context: F&G at 37 (fear), but Chris has the trading details.

transcript.speaker: Steve Jobs
transcript.message: Product update. Lever has 7 faith lessons live. Faith tab: 1100 lines. Family tab: 455 lines. Reviewing product roadmap priorities.

transcript.speaker: James Truchard
transcript.message: Test infrastructure status. TODOs/FIXMEs across codebase: 8.

transcript.speaker: Chris Vermeullen
transcript.message: Trading update. Paper equity at $100,626. F&G at 37 (fear), SPY regime: sideways. 0 BUY signals today, 4 open positions.

transcript.speaker: Jordan Peterson
transcript.message: Faith and family update. 8 faith dimensions active, 7 lessons.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Here's today's priority list: 1. Monitor market — SPY sideways, F&G at 37. Let's execute.

actionItems.text: Identify first revenue stream to activate

topPriorities: Monitor market — SPY sideways, F&G at 37

ceoDirectives.directive: What is Lever's direction? → Hybrid — personal tool now with product optionality built in
Keep faith content as separate standalone section (not merged into Family tab)
Keep cash liquid — no deployment until post-launch revenue data
App Store submission: full current build (all 4 tabs) as-is with faith lessons. Submit immediately after merge, ship modal as day-one update.
Paper trading MVP: manual entry (6 weeks), basic free / advanced analytics premium. Integrate into current Lever app finance tab.
Launch with delayed market data for both free and premium tiers. Real-time as future ultra-premium.
Org flattened to 8 C-suite agents. No permanent sub-agents — spawn dynamically via sessions_spawn.
